creator: de-freebsd@ctseuro.com
text:
Obviously the distfile for german/wordpress was re-rolled (seems to be usual with wordpress), so there is a size-mismatch in the current port

root@build01:/usr/ports/german/wordpress# make fetch
If you want to upgrade, you must read upgrade document.

===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
===>   de-wordpress-4.2.3 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> wordpress-4.2.3-de_DE.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://de.wordpress.org/wordpress-4.2.3-de_DE.tar.gz
fetch: http://de.wordpress.org/wordpress-4.2.3-de_DE.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 6727515, actual 6727495
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/wordpress-4.2.3-de_DE.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/wordpress-4.2.3-de_DE.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** [do-fetch] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/german/wordpress.
